module.description: Import stays from a .ics calendar export URL
host.alert.title: Export from Airbnb
host.alert.message: Airbnb → Calendar → Availability → Export calendar → copy the .ics link. Never share it publicly.
host.section.feeds.help: HTTPS URL of the .ics file (Airbnb, Booking, Vrbo…).
host.primary.label: Primary calendar
host.secondary.label: Second calendar (optional)
host.section.status.help: Updated after Sync feeds or the scheduled job.
host.main.help: Save the links, then use Sync feeds. Imported stays show up under Stays.
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Add at least one .ics calendar URL
module.status.inactive.title: Calendar module disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
